/home/runner/work/libvncserver/.codeql-scratch/dbs/cpp/working/autobuild/bin/cc -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/test_wstest.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/test_wstest.dir/test/wstest.c.o -o test/wstest  -Wl,-rpath,/home/runner/work/libvncserver/libvncserver/_codeql_build_dir libvncserver.so.0.9.15 -lm /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgnutls.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgnutls.so
